name: Printix
tagline: Cloud print management for the post-print-server stack.
summary: Printix (Tungsten Printix) is a cloud-native print management service that replaces on-prem print servers with a serverless model. Centralised driver delivery, secure pull-printing, mobile print, and reporting, administered per Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace tenant. Common in SMB and mid-market cloud-first deployments.
